title: Hornet Removal in Yorktown Heights | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Yorktown Heights, Westchester. Safe nest elimination from $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Yorktown Heights residents face hornet challenges due to the area's wooded landscapes and mix of historic and modern properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services throughout Yorktown Heights and surrounding Westchester communities. Our experienced technicians eliminate hornet nests from homes, businesses, and outdoor structures with proven methods that protect your family and pets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Yorktown Heights with same-day and emergency hornet removal services. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly treatments and provide guaranteed results, with transparent pricing from $350-$550 and no hidden fees for Westchester County residents.
localContext: Yorktown Heights' proximity to Franklin D. Roosevelt State Park and numerous lakefront properties creates ideal habitats for hornets, particularly around wooded estates and colonial-era homes near the Heritage Trail. Our team is familiar with the unique pest challenges faced by properties along Route 202 and the residential neighborhoods surrounding the Yorktown Community and Cultural Center.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Yorktown Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day hornet removal services throughout Yorktown Heights and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call. Emergency services are available for nests near doorways, playgrounds, or high-traffic areas where stings pose immediate danger.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for children and pets in my Yorktown Heights home?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during treatment and for 2-3 hours afterward. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the treatment method used.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, yellow jackets, and wasps?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger, typically black and white, and build aerial paper nests in trees or under eaves. Yellow jackets are smaller, yellow and black, and often nest in ground cavities or wall voids. All are aggressive when defending nests, but hornets deliver more painful stings due to their size. Our technicians can identify the species and use the appropriate removal method for your Yorktown Heights property.
